english: Receive the Mini Super Piranha, Mini Super Bunny, and Mini Super Turtle. Combine in the Mystic Forge with a Continue Coin to unlock the Mini Super Angry Cloud.
Received a report about a group being ambushed by a large mushroom while gathering mushrooms in the Bjorn Thicket.
Received a report about a large and hostile iboga south of Moon Camp.
Received a report about a large warg rampaging through Lupine Fields.
Received a report about a rather large, hostile wolf in the caves near Moon Camp.
Received a report of valravn at the cliffs near Lupine Fields.
Received a turtle egg from the Dragon's End meta-event or purchased one with Writs of Dragon's End.
Received from Ahel Nakat in the Ruination's Order of Shadows target range as a thanks for returning a piece of Forged armor to him.
Received from Aisha Jedgok at the Lair of the Forgotten's entrance in thanks for returning a sulfuric sample to her.
Received from completing the Unknown Nightmares: Experiments in the Shadows achievement
Received from Drojkor in Sand Jackal Run as a thanks for helping his undercover associates.
Received from Nori Mahat near the village of Purity's tents in thanks for returning Awakened intel to him.

Recent reports say Shiverpeaks Pass has become more dangerous since the icebrood construct caused an avalanche that severed the path farther north. Crecia and the Blood Legion are looking for volunteers to trek into the pass to check whether conditions are safe to begin rebuilding the way through.
Recharge all equipped skills by 2 seconds upon killing an enemy. <c=@reminder>Cooldown: 10 seconds</c>
Recharge all of your shatter skills when your health drops below the threshold.
